title: Without Damage Challenge
description: Hardcore too easy? Try beating it with half a heart, no totems, no armor, and no protective effects!
body:
**Without Damage Challenge** is a mod that allows you to set strict boundaries for your playthrough with a single download, making the challenge truly fair and honest. What's the point of a half-heart Hardcore challenge if you just use a totem or strong armor to survive accidental damage? Or if you use a Fire Resistance potion to carelessly walk through fire?

**NOTE**: All changes apply **EXCLUSIVELY** to Hardcore mode. Other game modes remain completely unaffected.

Features:
- Your maximum health is strictly locked at 1 HP.
- **Totems of Undying** no longer drop from Evokers, and even if you somehow obtain one, it will not work.
- Any incoming damage is amplified to 10,000, meaning even the strongest armor with 99% protection won't save you.
- The effects of **Resistance**, **Absorption**, **Health Boost**, and **Fire Resistance** are removed instantly upon application.
- The "Game Mode" and "Allow Cheats" buttons in the "Open to LAN" menu are disabled to prevent unfair revives.
- A new advancement tab with two unique achievements to highlight your absolute mastery and successful playthrough.

Good luck!
